meanings.open: When the authorized RFID card is presented and the medicine box is locked, the box will open.
meanings.locked: When the authorized RFID card is presented and the medicine box is open, the box will lock.
meanings.denied: An unauthorized RFID card is presented to the medicine box.
meanings.unusual_hours: The medicine box was opened outside its normal time periods.
meanings.high_access: The medicine box was opened more frequently than usual.

safety_anomalies_table.description: Summary of anomalies grouped by anomaly type and RFID card for a given date.

security_alert.description: Indicates current security state and last opened time of the medicine box.

security_logs_table.description: Logs every access attempt to the medicine box.

meanings.stable: No motion detected. Ideal transport conditions with zero risk.
meanings.moderate_vibration: Slight movement detected within acceptable limits. Medicine is safe.
meanings.high_vibration: High vibrations detected. Transport environment is unstable.
meanings.critical_shock: Critical impact detected exceeding safety limits. Immediate inspection required.

medicine_verdict.safe: Medicine transported within acceptable vibration limits.
medicine_verdict.use_with_caution: Significant vibration detected. Inspect before use.
medicine_verdict.compromised: Critical shock detected. Medicine safety cannot be guaranteed.

risk_levels.low: 0-29%: Smooth transportation, medicine likely in perfect condition.
risk_levels.moderate: 30-69%: Several rough patches encountered, visual inspection recommended.
risk_levels.high: 70-100%: Significant mechanical stress, lab verification required before distribution.

Motionlogs.status: string - rule-based: Stable / Moderate Vibration / High Vibration / Critical Shock
Motionlogs.ml_class: string - AI classification: Stable / Moderate Vibration / High Vibration / Critical Shock
Motionlogs.rolling_risk: float - overall trip risk percentage used for gauge needle

motion_logs_table.description: Logs every motion event showing time, net_g, total_g, and rule-based status.

current_status.description: The single most recent vibration reading showing live status.
current_status.location: Vibration card in the top status bar

transport_risk_chart.description: Gauge showing overall trip risk %. Displays AI classification, confidence, current risk score, rolling risk, and medicine verdict.
